opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I saved my couch from pet hair AND summer guests for $47
opportunities.before_state: Stained, fur-covered sofa with worn armrests guests are embarrassed to sit on
opportunities.after_state: Sleek modern couch that looks brand new — dog is already back on it
opportunities.why_now: Summer pet shedding peak combined with July 4th hosting pressure create dual urgency to fix embarrassing sofas before guests arrive in 24 days.

opportunities.specific_product: faux wood peel-and-stick removable wallpaper panels
opportunities.transformation_hook: My bathroom looks like a $500 reno — I spent $34
opportunities.before_state: Dated builder-beige bathroom walls that make the whole room look cheap and forgettable
opportunities.after_state: Warm wood-panel accent wall that makes guests ask 'wait, is that real wood?'
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is actively pinning a viral bathroom DIY where peel-and-stick faux wood fooled every guest, driving direct copycat search intent right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm original side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: Zero neck pain after one night — this $79 pillow changed everything
opportunities.before_state: Flat, unsupportive pillow causing stiff neck and groggy mornings, waking exhausted every day
opportunities.after_state: Deep uninterrupted sleep, no stiffness, waking up actually rested and pain-free
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for shoulder pain in bed
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is surging on college bedroom content ahead of back-to-school season, and neck-pain sleep searches spike in summer as sleep schedules shift.

opportunities.specific_product: waterproof LED outdoor Edison string lights 48ft
